data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplified navigation to reduce the time and cognitive load for users to make decisions.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes clear menus with limited and categorized choices.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Ensures actionable items are easily clickable by maintaining size and positioning according to user interactions.
data.technical_spec: Button sizes optimized for both desktop and mobile, ensuring minimum size for easy interaction.

data.title: Affordance Principles
data.description: Design elements indicate clear actions that users can take, promoting intuitive use.
data.technical_spec: Interactive elements like buttons and links are visually distinct and consistent.

data.title: Consistency and Standards
data.description: Consistent elements across pages for familiarity and ease of use.
data.technical_spec: Adheres to a design system for consistent styles, components, and patterns.

data.title: Accessibility Design
data.description: Ensures the platform is accessible to users with disabilities.
data.technical_spec: Follows WCAG 2.1 guidelines, implementing features such as text alternatives and keyboard navigability.
